CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT id, sys.isauuid(id) AS is_valid FROM uuids;
CREATE TABLE valid_uuids AS SELECT id FROM uuids WHERE sys.isauuid(id);
SELECT id FROM valid_uuids WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM uuids WHERE sys.isauuid(uuids.id));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM uuids WHERE sys.isauuid(id) = TRUE;
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM uuids WHERE sys.isauuid(id) IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE new_valid_uuids AS SELECT id FROM uuids WHERE sys.isauuid(id) UNION SELECT id FROM uuids WHERE id IS NULL;
SELECT a.id, b.id, sys.isauuid(a.id) AS is_a_uuid, sys.isauuid(b.id) AS is_b_uuid FROM uuids a JOIN uuids b ON a.id <> b;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN sys.isauuid(id) THEN 'Valid' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS uuid_status FROM uuids;
WITH uuid_check AS (SELECT id, sys.isauuid(id) AS is_valid FROM uuids) SELECT id FROM uuid_check WHERE is_valid = TRUE;
